name: North East Rubbers Public Company Limited
summary: North East Rubbers Public Company Limited engages in the manufacture and sale of rubber products in Thailand, China, Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysia, and internationally. It provides ribbed smoked sheets, mixture rubbers, and standard Thai rubbers primarily for the automotive industry, as well as produces and sells electricity from biogas. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Prakhon Chai, Thailand.
